conflict: Word-of-mouth success brings more clients, stranger carryovers, and enough foot traffic that secrecy starts to fail under its own popularity.
consequence: Blue Hour becomes a visible neighborhood institution, which makes future enforcement and public consequence inevitable.
must_land_beats: Let humor come from bodily absurdity, queue logic, and social embarrassment rather than authorial wink.
Show Lin discovering they are good with frightened people.
Build one public overlap episode that is funny and painful at the same time.
End with Mira choosing expansion over caution.
pressure_source: Word-of-mouth success brings more clients, stranger carryovers, and enough foot traffic that secrecy starts to fail under its own popularity.
state_shift: Blue Hour becomes a visible neighborhood institution, which makes future enforcement and public consequence inevitable.
